name: Erie Farmers Market

Products.value: Organic, transitional, and pesticide-free vegetables; fruit from Palisade, CO; meats; eggs; artisan breads; honey; cheese; coffee; baked goods; natural body care; massage services; flowers; plants; jewelry; art; packaged goods

notes: On-file website (realfarmersmarketco.com/erie-farmers-market/) is confirmed correct and official (Real Farmers Market Co is the operator running this market) — no repair needed. On-file Facebook (facebook.com/eriesfarmersmarket/) exists but page content could not be scraped for details (likely login-gated); left as-is since URL appears valid. Market runs Thu 5-8pm, May 7 - Sept 17, 2026, on Briggs St between Wells & Moffat in Erie (the on-file street-number address '515 Briggs St' was not confirmed or contradicted by the official site, so left unchanged). Email/phone are the operator's general contact (Kelly), listed on the official contact page and apply to this market. SNAP/EBT/Double Up acceptance and ADA accessibility were not stated on the official site or found via search, so omitted. No Instagram found on official site.
